title: Lake Como Boat Rental: Your Guide to Choosing the Perfect Vessel in 2026
topic: how to choose a boat to rent in Lake Como
html:
Renting a boat on Lake Como is the best way to discover its hidden villas and serene coves. Prices start from around 芒聜卢250 for a half-day self-drive motorboat from Como town. Whether you prefer speed or luxury, you can compare verified listings and hire a boat through BoatHire24, the worldwide marketplace for boat rentals.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Lake Como?

Rental prices range from 芒聜卢100 per person for a shared tour to over 芒聜卢2,000 for a private crewed yacht for the day. The cost depends on the boat type, season, and duration. Budget wisely for fuel and optional extras. You can hire a boat in a few minutes.

  • Shared group tour: 芒聜卢80芒聜卢150 per person, half day
  • Small motorboat (4芒聙聯6 guests) self-drive: 芒聜卢250芒聜卢450, half day
  • Catamaran (up to 12 guests) with skipper: 芒聜卢800芒聜卢1,500, full day
  • Luxury crewed motor yacht (e.g. Azimut 60): from 芒聜卢2,000, full day

Where to set off in Lake Como

Most boat rentals depart from the main towns or dedicated marinas around the lake. Key departure points include Como town (Porto di Como), the marina at Tremezzo near Villa Carlotta, the harbours at Bellagio and Varenna, and the facilities at Lecco on the southern branch. Each offers access to different stretches of the lake and a variety of boat hire companies. One option worth a look is this motor yacht.

For a quieter start, consider the smaller marina at Cadenabbia or the jetty at Menaggio. These spots provide direct access to the central basin and are less crowded in peak season.

Which boat to rent

Choose your vessel based on group size, licence requirements, and desired experience. Below are the most popular options available through BoatHire24. If you own a boat, you can list a boat for free and earn from spare days.

  1. Self-drive motorboat (芒聜卢250芒聙聯芒聜卢500 half-day) 芒聙聯 Ideal for small groups (up to 6) wanting flexibility. No licence required for boats under 40hp on Italian lakes.
  2. Luxury motor yacht (e.g. Fairline Targa 43, 芒聜卢900芒聙聯芒聜卢1,500 half-day) 芒聙聯 Perfect for a stylish day out with up to 8 guests. For details, see this motor yacht listing on BoatHire24.
  3. Sailing yacht (e.g. Sun Odyssey 349, 芒聜卢400芒聙聯芒聜卢700 half-day) 芒聙聯 A quieter, eco-friendlier choice for up to 6, requires sailing experience or a skipper.
  4. Catamaran (e.g. Lagoon 380, 芒聜卢600芒聙聯芒聜卢1,200 half-day) 芒聙聯 Stable and spacious for up to 10 guests, ideal for parties and sunbathing.
  5. Crewed classic Riva (芒聜卢800芒聙聯芒聜卢1,200 hour) 芒聙聯 Wooden runabout for up to 6, exclusively with a captain; the iconic Lake Como experience.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Lake Como?

In Italy, a patente nautica (boating licence) is required for motorboats over 40hp or longer than 10 metres. Many rental operators offer licence-free boats (engine power 40hp or less) for self-drive hire. Always confirm exact requirements with the operator when you enquire through BoatHire24.

芒聙聹The best time to visit Lake Como by boat is between May and September, when the mornings are calm before the Breva wind picks up from the south.芒聙聺

At a glance

  • Price band: 芒聜卢80 per person to 芒聜卢2,500 full day
  • Peak months: June, July, August
  • Typical trip length: 2芒聙聯8 hours
  • Capacity: 1芒聙聯12+ guests
  • Currency: EUR (芒聜卢)
  • Licence: Not needed for small motorboats under 40hp

Questions about boat rental in Lake Como

Can I rent a boat without a licence in Lake Como?

Yes, many operators offer small motorboats with engines under 40hp that do not require a licence; these are perfect for exploring the lake independently.

What is the best town to depart from for a day cruise?

Como town offers the widest choice of boats and consistent availability, while Bellagio provides a picturesque central location for starting your journey.

How long does it take to sail from Como to Bellagio by boat?

A direct journey by motorboat from Como to Bellagio covers roughly 30 km (16 nautical miles) and takes about 45 minutes at cruising speed.

Are meals included on a crewed yacht charter?

Most crewed charters offer optional catering at an extra cost, but many skippers can recommend local restaurants for a waterfront lunch stop.

BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Lake Como or list your own. If you own a boat on the lake, you can list a boat for free on BoatHire24 and start earning income from rentals.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Lake Como and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
